title: User Login System
description: Implement a secure user login system with email/password authentication

tasks.description: Create login UI component with email and password fields
tasks.deliveryPrompt: Create a login UI component with email and password input fields, a submit button, and proper form validation. Style it according to our design system.
Create a POST /api/auth/login endpoint that accepts email and password, validates credentials, and returns a JWT token.
Connect the login UI component to the authentication API. Handle loading states, error messages, and successful login redirects.

acceptanceCriteria.description: User can enter email and password and submit the form
Invalid credentials show appropriate error message

qaRules.question: what should happen after successful login
qaRules.answer: User should be redirected to the dashboard with a valid JWT token stored

qaRules.question: what validation is needed for email
qaRules.answer: Email should be validated for proper format (user@domain.com)
